title: LancerCraft
description: Pack based around the TTRPG Lancer from Massif Press. Mech building and a little eldritch horror.
body:
Based on Massif Press' TTRPG Lancer this pack contains mods for exploring the world beyond Cradle and horrors to unearth (Ad Astra, Gigeresque, Sons of Sins, Cracker's Wither Storm), a way to bring your mechs to life block by block (Armourer's Workshop), along with a handful of mods to help you build the hanger or spacecraft you've been thinking about in your sessions (Macaw's, Hearth & Home, Handcrafted, Another Furniture, Building But Better, Chisels and Bits).

Pack has player to player server abilities through e4mc, though Essentials is also known to work just fine. 

Includes mods to hopefully help with performance and keeping things stable for any Lancer out there.



This pack is fanmade and in no way associated with Massif Press or the official Lancer TTRPG.

Shoot me a message on my [lancer rp tumblr](https://www.tumblr.com/ch4r4d3-scheherazade) if you want to show off builds in or out of character, along with any homebrew company logos to include. 
Company logos are in Armourer's Workshop files, so place down a skin library block and grab what you need. :)

Mod that ask for direct credits:

[Another Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture) / [Hearth & Home](https://modrinth.com/mod/hearth-and-home) - Starfish Studios

[Cracker's Wither Storm](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod) - nonamecrackers2

[Macaw's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw) - sketchmacaw
